message:
feat: add VCR-aware integration test scripts

- test:integration now defaults to VCR_MODE=replay (fast, no API keys)
- test:integration:record for re-recording fixtures
- test:integration:live for all integration tests without VCR

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -14,7 +14,9 @@
     "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit",
     "test": "bun test",
     "test:unit": "bun test $(find test -name '*.test.ts' -o -name '*.test.tsx' | grep -v integration | grep -v 'anthropic\\.test' | grep -v 'gemini\\.test' | grep -v 'openai\\.test' | grep -v 'client\\.test')",
-    "test:integration": "bun test test/integration/ test/agents/agent.integration.test.ts test/learn/learn.integration.test.ts test/llm/anthropic.test.ts test/llm/gemini.test.ts test/llm/openai.test.ts test/llm/client.test.ts",
+    "test:integration": "VCR_MODE=replay bun test test/integration/e2e.test.ts test/agents/agent.integration.test.ts",
+    "test:integration:record": "VCR_MODE=record bun test test/integration/e2e.test.ts test/agents/agent.integration.test.ts",
+    "test:integration:live": "VCR_MODE=off bun test test/integration/e2e.test.ts test/agents/agent.integration.test.ts test/learn/learn.integration.test.ts test/llm/anthropic.test.ts test/llm/gemini.test.ts test/llm/openai.test.ts test/llm/client.test.ts",
     "test:all": "bun test",
     "test:watch": "bun test --watch",
     "precommit": "bun run check && bun run typecheck && bun run test:unit"
